Career Craft Consulting is a training, consulting, and placement organization focused on shaping skilled professionals for academic, corporate, and industry environments. ▸ Who We Are

Career Craft Consulting

Crafting Careers. Creating Futures.

Career Craft Consulting is dedicated to crafting careers through structured training, corporate capability building, and strategic placement support. With expertise in quality management, automation, analytics, compliance, and professional development, we help students, professionals, and organizations achieve measurable growth. Our approach combines real-world industry insights, hands-on learning, and continuous improvement principles to deliver sustainable career success.

🎯 Our Mission

We craft career-ready professionals through practical training, industry-aligned learning, corporate skill development, and structured placement support — bridging the gap between education and employment.

📍 Based in Chennai

Operating from the heart of Chennai's IT corridor, Career Craft Consulting connects students with top MNCs, startups, and corporates across India and beyond.

  • Classroom, Online & Hybrid Learning Modes
  • Weekend Batches for Working Professionals
  • Real-time Project Based Training
  • Industry Recognized Certifications

🏆 Why Choose Career Craft Consulting?

Unlike generic training institutes, Career Craft Consulting focuses on end-to-end career transformation:

  • Trainers with 10+ years Real Industry Experience
  • Mock Interviews & Resume Building Workshops
  • Direct Referrals to 50+ Hiring Partners
  • Placement Support until you Get a Job
  • Updated Curriculum Every Quarter
  • Soft Skills & Communication Training Included
  • EMI / Instalment Payment Options Available
  • Internship Programs & Live Project Exposure
  • Dedicated Placement Coordinator per Batch
  • WhatsApp Support Groups & Alumni Network

► Our Journey

Events & Collaborations

Real moments from our growing network of industry conclaves, university partnerships, and expert sessions that directly shape how we train our students.

🤝
Industry-Academia Conclave 2026
Christ University (Deemed to be University) · School of Sciences · Bengaluru, Karnataka · Feb 2026
🏆 Distinguished Delegate
View Full
CCC x Christ University 2026
Panel Discussion - Industry-Academia Conclave
CCC represented at the prestigious Industry-Academia Conclave hosted by Christ University, Bengaluru. Our founder participated as an Industry Expert in the Panel Discussion on Graduate Preparedness, sharing insights on bridging the skill gap between campus and corporate.
View Full
CCC x Christ University 2026
Group Photo - Distinguished Delegates
Proud to be among 100+ industry leaders, academics, and corporate professionals at the Industry-Academia Conclave Inauguration. A powerful gathering of minds committed to transforming graduate employability across India.
View Full
CCC x Christ University 2026
Distinguished Delegate Award and Recognition
Career Craft Consulting was honoured with the Distinguished Delegate recognition by Christ University School of Sciences for our valuable contribution to the Industry-Academia Conclave 2026. A proud milestone for our growing institution!

More photos coming soon — follow us on LinkedIn for updates.
